title: Analyze bundle composition for a change
description: Run a bundle analyzer for the changed build and report the largest modules, duplicates, and the initial-path size delta.
body: Use when a dependency or import change may grow the shipped JavaScript. Actions: build with source-map/bundle analysis enabled, report the largest contributing modules, any duplicated dependencies, and the initial-route transfer-size delta versus baseline. Do not estimate bundle impact from package size alone; tree-shaking and dedup change the real cost. This skill exposes capability only and must not run an arbitrary build without runtime permission. Validation signals include an analyzer report and a measured size diff. Risk boundary: if the analyzer cannot run, report bundle impact as unverified rather than asserting it is negligible.
